title: 🔥存量博弈：资金回流BTC
body: 市场处于存量资金避险阶段。BTC.D 报 58.5%，7 日逆势上涨 0.7%。在价格普跌 12.1% 的背景下，比特币主导度的提升证明资金正在从山寨币撤离并抱团 BTC。这种结构性分化意味着市场风险偏好极低，短期内难言全面回暖。中性。流动性困局何时打破？
title_en: 🔥Zero-Sum Game: Capital Rotating Back to BTC
body_en:
The market is currently in risk-off mode, trading within existing liquidity. BTC.D sits at 58.5%, bucking the trend with a 0.7% rise over the last 7 days.
With the market bleeding an average of 12.1%, the spike in Bitcoin dominance confirms capital is fleeing altcoins to crowd into BTC.
This structural divergence signals that risk appetite is rock bottom. A broad market recovery in the short term is unlikely.
Neutral.
When will the liquidity deadlock break?
